features.name: Overdue action fetcher with daily cap
features.description: Query Supabase crm_contacts WHERE next_action IS NOT NULL AND next_action_at<=now() AND pipeline_stage IN ('first_touch','replied','interested') ORDER BY offer_readiness DESC LIMIT 20. Load next-action-state.json for today's actionsExecuted count. Reset if date changed. Enforce MAX_DAILY_ACTIONS=10. Log found count and slots remaining.

features.name: Action classifier via Claude Haiku
features.description: For each contact's next_action text: call Claude Haiku to classify as send_linkedin_message/send_instagram_dm/send_twitter_dm/send_offer/research_only/skip with message_hint. Fallback keyword matching: 'linkedin'→send_linkedin_message, 'offer' or offer_readiness>=20→send_offer, else match platform. Skip research_only and skip contacts.

features.name: Message generator via Claude Haiku
features.description: For executable actions: call Claude Haiku to write personalized 2-3 sentence follow-up based on next_action instruction, display_name, headline, ai_summary. Enforce length: Twitter/IG<300 chars, LinkedIn<600 chars. Fallback to next_action text directly if Claude fails.

features.name: Action executor — per platform
features.description: send_linkedin_message: POST http://localhost:3105/api/linkedin/messages/send {profileUrl, message}. send_instagram_dm: POST http://localhost:3100/api/messages/send-to {username, text}. send_twitter_dm: POST http://localhost:3003/api/twitter/messages/send-to {username, text}. send_offer: generate offer message (AI Automation Audit $2500), send via platform, set last_offer_sent/last_offer_at. 30-60s delay between actions. Auth header on all requests.

features.name: CRM update after execution
features.description: On success: UPDATE crm_contacts SET next_action=NULL, next_action_at=NULL, last_outbound_at=now(), messages_sent=messages_sent+1. If send_offer: set pipeline_stage='proposal_sent'. If was 'replied': advance to 'interested'. Insert audit row in safari_command_queue. Send Telegram: '✅ Next action executed: {name} ({platform}) — {action_type}'. Increment actionsExecuted in state file.

features.name: Daemon loop + launch-next-action-executor.sh
features.description: Runs every 2h (NEXT_ACTION_INTERVAL_HOURS=2). Only 09:00-18:00. CLI: --once, --dry-run (classify+generate, no sends), --list (show overdue without executing). Log to harness/logs/next-action-executor.log. Launch script with start/stop/status/list/dry-run/logs. Register in watchdog-queue.sh.

features.name: Integration test suite
features.description: Tests: (1) --list queries Supabase and prints overdue contacts, (2) --dry-run classifies and generates messages without sending, (3) daily limit stops at MAX_DAILY_ACTIONS, (4) after --once a real overdue contact has next_action=NULL in Supabase. Print PASS/FAIL.
